data.content:
methodology,reliance	Abel Lemma
Campbell
Campbell's technique relies on a modified Abel lemma.

authorship	Yamaguchi
Yamaguchis Q-Analogue
Yamaguchi created the q-analogue referenced in the text.

methodology,reliance	Abel Lemma
Cantarini
Cantarini's technique relies on a modified Abel lemma.

authorship	Gosper
Gospers Identity
Gosper is the original author of the identity discussed.

comparison,inequivalence	Gospers Identity
Yamaguchis Q-Analogue
Gosper's identity and Yamaguchi's q-analogue are presented as inequivalent to each other.

influence,inspiration	Chu
Modified Abel Lemma
Chu's research contributions inspired the modified Abel lemma and the work.

authorship	Bailey
Baileys Classic Text
Bailey is the author of the classic text used for background.

background,theory	Bailey
Generalized Hypergeometric Series
The classic text by Bailey provides background on generalized hypergeometric series.

content,definition	Section 1.1
Shifted Factorial
Section 1.1 includes the definition for shifted factorials.

application,construction	Q-Analogue
Section 2.1–2.3
Sections 2.1 through 2.3 discuss the construction of q-analogues.

contrast,mathematical operators	Backward Difference Operator
Forward Difference Operator
The text defines the backward and forward difference operators as distinct methods consistent with research contributions.

definition,introduction	Backward Difference Operator
Section 1.1
Section 1.1 defines the backward difference operator within preliminaries.

definition,introduction	Forward Difference Operator
Section 1.1
Section 1.1 defines the forward difference operator within preliminaries.

definition,introduction	Generalized Hypergeometric Series
Section 1.1
Section 1.1 introduces the definition of generalized hypergeometric series.

definition,introduction	Q-Shifted Factorial
Section 1.1
Section 1.1 introduces standard notation for q-shifted factorials.

analogue,mathematical transformation	Q-Shifted Factorial
Shifted Factorial
Q-Shifted Factorial is obtained as a q-analogue of the shifted factorial.

basis,dependency	Modified Abel Lemma
Technique
The q-version technique is based on the modified Abel lemma.

authorship,contribution	Campbell
Gospers Identity
Campbell contributes to the new q-analogue of Gosper’s identity.

authorship,contribution	Cantarini
Gospers Identity
Cantarini contributes to the new q-analogue of Gosper’s identity.

proof,simplification	Campbell
Yamaguchis Q-Analogue
Campbell's technique provides a simplified proof of Yamaguchi’s q-analogue.

proof,simplification	Cantarini
Yamaguchis Q-Analogue
Cantarini's technique provides a simplified proof of Yamaguchi’s q-analogue.
